text.title: Pattern Lifecycle and CLAUDE.md Sync
text.summary: Confidence scoring formula, lifecycle stages, score triggers, CLAUDE.md sync rules, and maintenance procedures.

rule.statement: Calculate confidence using the weighted formula: base_score × usage_factor × success_factor × recency_factor.
rule.rationale: Objective scoring prevents subjective inflation. The recency factor ensures patterns that go unused naturally decay rather than cluttering the active pattern store.

example.code:
confidence = base_score * usage_factor * success_factor * recency_factor
Where: base_score: 0.5 (initial) usage_factor: min(usage_count / 10, 1.5) success_factor: success_rate ^ 0.5 recency_factor: 1.0 - (days_since_last_use / 365) * 0.3

rule.statement: Sync patterns with confidence 0.8+ and 5+ uses to CLAUDE.md; never include low-confidence or verbose patterns.
rule.rationale: CLAUDE.md is loaded in every session. Bloating it with unvalidated or verbose patterns wastes context budget and trains agents to ignore the patterns section.

list.item: Include in CLAUDE.md: high-confidence patterns (0.8+), frequently used (5+ uses), project-specific conventions, critical anti-patterns from mistakes.md
Exclude from CLAUDE.md: low-confidence patterns (still validating), obvious patterns (well-known best practices), verbose code examples (link to patterns.md instead)

example.code:
## Learned Patterns
### PAT-001: Async Error Boundary **Confidence:** 0.92 | **Uses:** 15 | **Success:** 93% - Wrap async operations with try-catch-finally - Manage loading/error/data states explicitly - Display appropriate UI for each state See: .aidocs/memory/patterns.md#PAT-001
example.note: Concise summary with link to full pattern. Metrics visible at a glance. No inline code in CLAUDE.md.

rule.statement: Archive patterns unused for 90+ days to patterns-archive.md rather than deleting them.
rule.rationale: Seasonal or infrequent tasks may need patterns that appear dormant. Archiving preserves them while keeping the active store clean.

list.item: Review patterns.md after every 5 completed tasks for duplicates and outdated entries
Merge patterns that solve the same problem in the same context
Add version/context reference to patterns validated against a specific library version
Apply confidence decay formula to patterns unused 90+ days

text.reference: Shell script syncing high-confidence patterns to CLAUDE.md
Prompts for post-task extraction and periodic review
